name: Zscaler, Inc.
summary: Zscaler, Inc. is a cloud-native cybersecurity company founded in 2007 that operates the Zscaler Zero Trust Exchange platform, enabling secure digital transformation for enterprises and government agencies. Its core products include Zscaler Internet Access (ZIA), Zscaler Private Access (ZPA), and Zscaler Digital Experience (ZDX), delivered across 160+ public exchanges globally. The platform serves over 9,400 customers, including ~40% of Forbes Global 2000 and 45%+ of Fortune 500 companies, generating $2,673.1 million in fiscal 2025 revenue.
